title: Question, Persuade, Refer (QPR) Suicide Prevention Training
summary: In honor of Mental Health Awareness Month, the Perkasie Borough Police Department will be hosting a free suicide prevention training on May 13th from 6 p.m. to 7:30 p.m. within the conference room of our station at 311 S 9th Street, Perkasie PA 18944. The training is open to a...
